reviews.review_description:
Yes the steering could be better and the scenes are basic but it is worth a play. Some parts are really addictive (and frustrating to complete).
It's 3 games in 1 (plus free roam). You get to race, negotiate challenging timed tracks, and try to set the best time carrying various items that can fall out of your basket (my favourite!). Can anyone get that bomb to the end?

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We will make some of the challenging parts easier with small updates. Enjoy the game!

reviews.review_description: Terrible game turning features suck do not buy would not let me refund after 1 hour DO NOT BUY!!!!!!!.

developer_response.body: You’ve only played for a total of 2 minutes — your refund should have gone through?

reviews.review_description: The dev does a good job to translate a genuine mountainbike experience to VR. I really got the feeling to hold the handle of a mountainbike 😁 I have no problems with motion sickness, but I could imagine that it could lead to it for sensitive folk. The graphics are decent and in general I thought it is a worthwhile experience for a fair price

I have bought a lot of biking VR games to see which one is the best. For example, I bought motoxVR and sbkVR rider which both turned out to be amazing games. This game is different with a lot of poorly made mechanics that bring the game down. It is very important you read this before buying because I played the game for 6 hours to really see the whole game. 

Cons:

This game has some of the worst movement ever. The turning feels EXTREMELY janky that it’s almost unplayable. The graphics are pretty bad and there are 3 modes with no multiplayer or free ride. The whole atmosphere and setting feels very childish and as if was made on abc mouse, especially with the annoying music in the background. Also, for some reason, you can’t choose your own character or bike, they’re just randomly selected. 

Pros:

EXTREMELY GOOD POTENTIAL. With fixing all the cons I mentioned. This game would probably be the #1 seller on the store. It is a very good investment but however, a lot of games like these with very good potential usually never get fixed and are just left abandoned.

Conclusion:

The game has very good potential, but that’s the only good thing it has. All these very major issues bring the game down. If this game ever gets updated and fixed In the future, I will make another review testing it and comparing it.
Overall, this game is not worth the price and the investment is very risky.

developer_response.body: Looking at the data, we can see that your playtime was very short(6 hours not correct). We greatly value feedback and with the upcoming update we aim to reach more players. We would appreciate it if you did not mislead people with fake reviews or use this as a way to promote other games. In addition, we kindly ask players who enjoyed the game and see this review to also leave their feedback. This would be a great support for us both in improving the game and preventing fake users :)

reviews.review_title: Pretty good but controls need some work
reviews.review_description: Its a pretty good game, but as a Mountainbiker, the Controls are a little bit weird, they are too sensitive.
Worst controls if you slightly move to the left you wobble so much it’s a horrible game don’t get it I want a refund

developer_response.body: The controls were designed to be close to real driving. We will review your valuable feedback.

reviews.review_description:
Mountain Bike Downhill is a fun and surprisingly realistic mountain bike simulation packed with content and variety. You can choose between three main modes — Stunt, Challenge, and Cargo — each bringing its own flavor and level of difficulty.

The bike handling feels incredibly natural, and the developers have done a great job capturing the true sensation of maneuvering a mountain bike through rugged terrain. The Stunt mode stands out, offering exhilarating jumps and tricks that feel both fun and authentic.

There’s plenty of replayability here, with lots of levels to unlock and satisfying progression as you improve your skills. You might need a few retries to clear some stages, but that’s part of the fun and what makes it so rewarding.

A solid VR biking experience that balances realism, challenge, and fun perfectly — ideal for players who enjoy mastering physics-based games

developer_response.body: Thank you for your nice review :)

reviews.review_title: Balancing your bike isn’t that easy
reviews.review_description:
Just finished my first run in the game. But this was a bummer for me. I am so bad in riding a mountainbike.  

Before you start a round, make sure you have your hands well positioned on the steer. Use the tricker to accelerate.

Didn’t use the acceleration much in the ‘STUNT’ mode, if I did, I felt of the track😤.

There is also the ‘CHALLENGE’ mode. Try to get to the finish as fast as you can, and don’t forget to drink your power drink so you don’t get out of breath.

My favorite mode is ‘CARGO’.  Keep the ball inside your basket.

On my YT channel, you can see my gameplay.

https://youtu.be/ONlptD9HZN4?si=3qNS8udS82-V433G

Just purchased thisgame about 10mins ago and for me its the BEST mountainbike racing game on the quest so far and hardly any motion sickness. i bet after some updates it will be untouchably greater.....and thanks devs forthe price.. Just a few updates pleaaaase❤️

developer_response.body: Thank you for your nice comment :)

reviews.review_description: I love everything bikes, and when I saw this game I had to try it. I really like it! It’s fun and challenging. It took me so long to get past the cargo bomb level lol. I think I finally finished with like 2 seconds left or something. Looking forward to playing more and seeing how the game turns out. A couple suggestions: maybe some instructions especially regarding controls, and it would be really cool to be able to pick different bikes or customize them with different components. Maybe you could earn points/money to buy the bikes/components. Also, for going uphill, maybe make it that tapping the right trigger “pedal” makes you get up the climb. I felt like I was sometimes instinctively trying to do that to get up steeper parts but it wasn’t super smooth. Sometimes I couldn’t make it up a hill no matter what, but maybe it was just user error. Can’t wait to see where the game goes. Send it!

developer_response.body: Thanks for your comment.. We are so glad you had fun.

reviews.review_title: Shows potential,  ok for asking price
reviews.review_description:
This is a very nice but janky title,  feels like it's currently still in a "polished  alpha mode'.
 Nevertheless  it's showing a lot of potential if future updates are applied (hopefully) to controls & graphics.

I am using a Quest 3 and the graphics are pretty basic even for quest 2 users ( I have a quest 2 as well).

Currently MTB Downhill feels  like riding a silent dirt track  motorbike or an electric bike rather than pedalling a mountain bike -  there's no peddling ( even by hand movement). 

*The developer in my opinion, should have transferred the peddling to the hands using a cycling hand movement to move forward, and the player's hands should be automatically glued to the bike handlebars and the turning by using the analogue stick together with leaning your body right or left - this way player's could get a workout while playing having to use their hands for movement.

*I still think MTB Downhill  is a good game for the asking price  of £6 pounds.
Buy it ⭐⭐⭐
There are levels in different styles. Especially the time trial levels have added excitement.

developer_response.body: We will add new ones too!
